HP post-merger did become #1 in global PC shipments in mid-2003 and held the lead on-and-off vs Dell through 2005; Dell regained lead 2005-2006; Lenovo passed both 2013. Gartner IDC shipment data confirms HP's near-term #1 goal achieved but not durably.

Prediction directionally correct on Palm decline; Pocket PC also displaced rather than victorious.
